name: Arvind SmartSpaces Limited
summary: Arvind SmartSpaces Limited engages in the development of real estate projects in India. It develops residential, commercial, and industrial projects in Ahmedabad, Pune, and Bengaluru. The company was formerly known as Arvind Infrastructure Limited and changed its name to Arvind SmartSpaces Limited in November 2016. Arvind SmartSpaces Limited was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Ahmedabad, India.
